description: Remove recruit auto-advance, enhance Raijin overlay, add Fujin undo button, fix season cards modal z-index, and improve kami-action-overlay width.
steps: 1. Remove recruit auto-advance in gameStore.ts - player must press Terminar manually
2. Enhance Raijin overlay in GameBoard.tsx with ClanShield, font-size reduction, bigger BushiIcon
3. Change Fujin translation to put count first: '{count} Movimientos'
4. Add Fujin undo button with fujinPreMoveState in store
6. Increase kami-action-overlay max-width and add white-space:nowrap
acceptance_criteria: Recruit mandate does not auto-advance when placements reach 0 - player must press Terminar
Raijin overlay shows ClanShield before player name, smaller font, larger BushiIcon
Fujin overlay has an undo button that reverts the last move
Season cards modal renders above the honor track
Kami action overlay fits content in one line
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
Run npx vite build to verify build succeeds
findings: All changes verified with tsc --noEmit and vite build. Both recruit placement handlers (province and temple shinto) no longer auto-advance; player must use doSkipRecruitTurn. Fujin undo stores pre-move snapshot as fujinPreMoveState, cleared on Fujin phase start and doFujinDone. Translations changed from 'Movimientos {count}' to '{count} Movimientos'. Season cards modal z-index raised to 1200 to render above honor track (1100). Kami overlay widened to 700px with nowrap.
